case_title: EAST BAY CASH REGISTER EXCHANGE INC. VS AHUJAD, MOHAMMAD O. INDDBA BONO PIZZA

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EAST BAY CASH REGISTER EXCHANGE INC.
